title: HR Manager (Regional Role – SG, HK & Japan)
description:
• Remuneration Package: Up to SGD 5,500 + Variable Bonus

  • Working Location: CBD (Near MRT Station)

  • Work Arrangement: Hybrid Work Model

  • Key Requirement: Prior HR experience managing Japan and/or Hong Kong is mandatory

A leading global organisation within the corporate travel and ground transportation management industry is seeking an experienced and strategic HR Manager to join its regional team. With operations across multiple continents and thousands of cities worldwide, this organisation is recognised for its cutting-edge technology, premium service standards, and strong global leadership culture. As the business continues to expand across Asia-Pacific, they are looking for a high-calibre HR professional to drive regional people strategy and organisational excellence.

About the Role

This is a key regional role responsible for leading and enhancing all HR functions across Singapore, Hong Kong, and Japan. You will partner closely with global stakeholders and regional leaders to ensure HR strategies are aligned with business objectives while cultivating a high-performance, people-centric culture.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement HR strategies aligned with regional and global business goals.
  • Oversee the full HR lifecycle, including recruitment, onboarding, performance management, learning & development, compensation & benefits, and employee engagement.
  • Ensure compliance with employment legislation across Singapore, Hong Kong and Japan.
  • Manage employee relations, including grievance handling, dispute resolution and workplace advisory.
  • Partner with senior leaders on talent management, succession planning and organisational development.
  • Lead regional Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI) initiatives.
  • Drive HR analytics, reporting and data-driven decision making.
  • Collaborate with global HR teams and external partners, including recruitment agencies and government bodies.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration or related discipline.
  • Minimum 5 years of HR experience, including at least 2 years in a regional or international role.
  • Strong working knowledge of Singapore, Hong Kong or Japan employment laws.
  • Experience in a multinational or regional corporate environment.
  • Excellent stakeholder management, communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Proven ability to manage change in a fast-paced environment.
  • HR certifications (SHRM, CIPD, IHRP) will be an added advantage.

Why This Opportunity?

  • Regional leadership role with strong visibility and business impact.
  • Exposure to a truly global organisation within the corporate travel industry.
  • Opportunity to shape and influence people strategy across multiple countries.
  • Collaborative, professional and high-performance culture with hybrid work flexibility.

Interested candidates may forward their CVs in MS Word format to weiyan@triton-ai.com

Reg No.: R1983718
Triton AI Pte Ltd
EA License No.: 21C0661

postedCompany.description:
TRITON AI (EA License Number 21C0661) is a Singaporean-owned talent resource organization formed with the purpose of developing a Singaporean core for our clients.


Established since 2011 and formally operating as Talent Touche Pte Ltd, TRITON AI has undergone a total rebranding exercise in 2021 in alignment with our mission to enhance the effectiveness of Talent Acquisition and People-Powered Projects with Technology and Artificial Intelligence.
postedCompany.name: TRITON AI PTE. LTD.
